transcript_summary: Pass 01 draft transcript. ~18 min walkthrough: opens chart, confirms patient/encounter/department, opens Notes activity to write a progress note, demonstrates note type picker and SmartTool inserts, switches to order entry to place labs and meds, reviews sign-block behavior when required fields are missing, closes with common blockers (wrong context, blank SmartLink) and escalation guidance. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW before any learner exposure.

chapters.title: Chart / encounter context
chapters.notes: Speaker opens chart, points at patient banner + encounter selector, calls out department context as the #1 cause of wrong-tab issues. Confirm patient + encounter before note or order.

chapters.title: Provider note workflow
suggested_ask_triggers: where do I write my note
chapters.notes: Opens Notes activity from sidebar, picks Progress Note type, shows note editor with template and SmartTool insertion.

chapters.title: Order entry workflow
chapters.notes: Switches to Manage Orders / order entry, searches and selects lab + medication, sets priority and frequency.

chapters.title: Signing / submitting
chapters.notes: Sign block / required-field gate demo: attempts sign, system highlights missing diagnosis + required note field.

chapters.title: Common blockers
chapters.notes: Walks through SmartLink resolving blank, missing template, wrong context as the three most common ticket drivers.

chapters.title: Escalation handoff
chapters.notes: Wraps with command-center handoff: capture role, encounter, error text, screenshot before paging.

transcript_summary: Pass 01 draft transcript. ~22 min lessons-learned session covering In Basket layout, shared message pools and coverage, results and Rx refill folders, routing/reassign behavior, closing the loop with Done/Complete, and the wrong-pool root causes that drive most missed-message tickets. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW before any learner exposure.

chapters.title: In Basket overview
chapters.notes: Tours folder rail, message list, preview pane. Calls out filters and sort order as first-line cleanup.

chapters.title: Message pools
chapters.notes: Explains pool membership, coverage windows, why a covering provider sees / does not see items.

chapters.title: Results / refills
chapters.notes: Walks Results folder + Rx Request folder, shows acknowledge vs forward vs reply-to-patient lanes.

chapters.title: Routing / reassigning
chapters.notes: Forward, route, delegate. Notes that delegate does not transfer accountability without acknowledgement.

chapters.title: Closing the loop
chapters.notes: Done vs Complete actions, when message disappears from pool vs stays for cosign.

chapters.title: Common wrong-pool issues
chapters.notes: Coverage gaps, pool not assigned, provider not on schedule. The three patterns behind most 'I never got the message' tickets.

transcript_summary: Pass 02 draft transcript. ~20 min companion In Basket session: re-tours the layout with attention to folder customization, deepens shared pool/coverage behavior, walks Results / Rx Refill / Patient Message folders, covers routing and ownership transfer, closes-the-loop with Done vs Complete vs cosign, and ends on wrong-pool root-cause troubleshooting. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW before any learner exposure.

chapters.title: In Basket overview
chapters.notes: Re-tours folder rail, message list, preview pane. Highlights folder customization (show/hide) and filter persistence as first-line cleanup.

chapters.title: Pools and folders
chapters.notes: Shared pool membership, coverage windows, why a covering provider sees / does not see items. Folder-by-pool layout.

chapters.title: Results, refills, patient messages
chapters.notes: Walks Results, Rx Request, and Patient Medical Advice folders. Acknowledge vs forward vs reply-to-patient lanes.

chapters.title: Routing and ownership
chapters.notes: Forward, route, delegate. Ownership transfer requires acknowledgement from receiver; otherwise accountability stays with sender.

chapters.title: Closing the loop
chapters.notes: Done vs Complete actions; messages awaiting cosign stay in folder until attending signs.

chapters.title: Wrong-pool troubleshooting
chapters.notes: Three root causes: coverage gap, pool not assigned to provider, provider not on schedule for that day. Diagnostic checks before paging support.

transcript_summary: Pass 01 draft transcript. ~20 min training on SmartSet + SmartTools family: opening and applying a SmartSet, picking sections and orders, inserting SmartText/SmartPhrase, answering SmartList prompts, troubleshooting blank/wrong SmartLink output, and the personal-vs-shared ownership model for SmartPhrases. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW before any learner exposure.

chapters.title: SmartSet basics
chapters.notes: Defines SmartSet, opens via SmartSet activity, applies to current encounter.

chapters.title: Order set selection
chapters.notes: Section checkboxes, default-selected vs optional orders. Demonstrates 'missing order' caused by unchecked section.

chapters.title: SmartText / SmartPhrase
chapters.notes: Dot-phrase expansion in note editor, search for shared phrase, preview before insert.

chapters.title: SmartList prompts
chapters.notes: F2 navigation through pick lists, single vs multi-select, why a SmartList sometimes does not prompt.

chapters.title: SmartLink troubleshooting
chapters.notes: Blank output = no data in source; wrong data = stale cache or wrong encounter context. Shows refresh path.

chapters.title: Personal vs shared tools
chapters.notes: Owner controls edits; shared phrases propagate; personal copies do not auto-update.

transcript_summary: Pass 02 draft transcript. ~18 min walk-through of procedure documentation using macros/templates: confirms procedure encounter and role, selects the right macro, fills required fields, demonstrates a missing/shared macro fail path, finalizes with sign and cosign, and ends with escalation guidance when a shared macro is broken. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW before any learner exposure.

chapters.title: Procedure documentation context
chapters.notes: Confirms procedure encounter type (not office visit), correct department, and that login role permits procedure documentation before opening the note.

chapters.title: Macro / template selection
chapters.notes: Opens macro picker, distinguishes personal vs shared/department macros, picks the procedure-specific macro and inserts into the note.

chapters.title: Required fields
chapters.notes: Sign-block gate demo: indication, operators, findings, complications are required. Highlighted fields prevent sign.

chapters.title: Applying or missing macros
chapters.notes: Failure modes: shared macro not assigned to user/department, SmartLink inside macro blank, wrong encounter context pulling no data. Recovery path: refresh, re-select, switch to backup macro.

chapters.title: Signing and finalizing
chapters.notes: Sign + cosign routing for trainees. Addendum lane for post-sign corrections.

chapters.title: Escalation when shared macro fails
chapters.notes: Capture macro name/owner, encounter, screenshot of empty/wrong output, then page macro owner or informatics. Do not silently retype around it.

transcript_summary: Pass 02 draft transcript. ~22 min inpatient ordering walk-through: establishes diagnosis-driven ordering context, tours the order entry workspace, demos lab/imaging/medication paths with priority and frequency, walks signing and the pending-order state, troubleshoots missing/wrong orders from encounter-context mismatch, and closes with the escalation handoff. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW before any learner exposure.

chapters.title: Diagnosis and ordering context
chapters.notes: Inpatient encounter + admitting department check. Diagnosis association is mandatory for downstream orders and billing.

chapters.title: Order entry workspace
chapters.notes: Tours Manage Orders activity: search bar, preference lists, order set rail, cart/pending column.

chapters.title: Labs, imaging, medications
chapters.notes: Type-specific paths: lab priority/specimen, imaging reason-for-exam, medication dose/route/frequency/duration. Common BPA prompts called out.

chapters.title: Signing and pending orders
chapters.notes: Sign block + cosign for trainees. Unsigned/Initiated state explained: order placed but not active until sign is complete.

chapters.title: Missing or wrong order troubleshooting
chapters.notes: Encounter mismatch is the #1 cause of 'order disappeared'. Verify patient, encounter, and order status filter before re-entering.

chapters.title: Escalation handoff
chapters.notes: Packet contents: patient MRN, encounter id, order name, status, screenshot, time of attempt. Send before paging.

transcript_summary: Pass 03 draft transcript. ~19 min inpatient notes walk-through: establishes inpatient encounter + admitting service context, picks the correct note type (H&P, progress, discharge), walks required SOAP + attestation sections, demonstrates copy-forward with refresh of stale SmartLinks, signs with cosign routing for trainees, and closes with the addendum/correction lane for post-sign edits. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW before any learner exposure.

chapters.title: Inpatient note context
chapters.notes: Confirms inpatient encounter + admitting service before opening Notes. Wrong encounter is the #1 driver of misfiled inpatient notes.

chapters.title: Note type selection
chapters.notes: Picks H&P, Progress, or Discharge note from type picker. Notes when type is hidden by role/department filter.

chapters.title: Required sections
chapters.notes: S/O/A/P + attestation gates. Highlighted required fields block sign until populated.

chapters.title: Copy-forward / refresh
chapters.notes: Copy-forward from prior note; refresh stale SmartLinks before sign. Demonstrates wrong-data risk if refresh skipped.

chapters.title: Signing / cosign
chapters.notes: Sign + attestation routing for residents/students. Cosign queue lands in attending's In Basket.

chapters.title: Addendum / correction
chapters.notes: Post-sign correction lane: addendum appends, original signed text is preserved per policy.

source_title: Provider Inpatient List and Clinical Review
transcript_summary: Pass 03 draft transcript. ~21 min walk-through of patient lists and chart review: tours system vs my-list patient lists, applies unit/team/coverage filters, troubleshoots a missing patient via coverage and filter checks, walks chart review tabs, reviews results and active orders, and closes with sign-out / escalation packet handoff. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW before any learner exposure.

chapters.title: Patient list basics
chapters.notes: System lists vs personal lists. How to add a personal list and pin it.

chapters.title: Filters and context
chapters.notes: Unit, team, coverage filters. Filter persistence across sessions; wrong filter looks like a missing patient.

chapters.title: Missing patient troubleshooting
chapters.notes: Three checks: coverage assignment, active filter, list type. Resolves most 'patient missing' tickets without paging.

chapters.title: Clinical review
chapters.notes: Tours Chart Review tabs (Encounters, Labs, Imaging, Notes). Filter + date-range usage.

chapters.title: Results / orders review
chapters.notes: Results review folder + active/pending orders panel from list. Calls out unsigned/initiated as a frequent surprise on rounds.

chapters.title: Handoff / escalation
chapters.notes: Sign-out + escalation packet contents: patient, encounter, outstanding issues, pending follow-ups.

transcript_summary: Pass 03 draft transcript. ~20 min perioperative walk-through: reads case status from the OR board, validates pre-op readiness, confirms consent and pre-op orders, documents the procedure with op-note macros, drives room/status movement events, and closes with the escalation handoff when status or documentation is blocked. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW before any learner exposure.

chapters.title: Case status
chapters.notes: OR status board tour: scheduled, pre-op, in-room, closed. How to find a case by surgeon/room/time.

chapters.title: Pre-op readiness
chapters.notes: Pre-op checklist: H&P current, NPO, allergies, anesthesia eval. Holds block movement to in-room.

chapters.title: Consent and orders
chapters.notes: Consent status badge + required pre-op orders. Missing consent stops the case at pre-op gate.

chapters.title: Procedure documentation
chapters.notes: Op-note macro selection + required fields (indication, operators, findings, complications). Brief vs full op note.

chapters.title: Room / status movement
chapters.notes: Status events: in-room, anesthesia start, procedure start/stop, out-of-room, PACU. Drives downstream charges + billing.

chapters.title: Escalation
chapters.notes: Stuck status, missing consent at gate, op-note macro broken. Capture case id + screenshot before paging perioperative informatics.

transcript_summary: Pass 03 draft transcript. ~18 min nursing ClinDoc walk-through: overview of the ClinDoc workspace, flowsheet row/time-column basics, required-field gating, corrections and uncharting via iView, and nursing escalation packet when documentation cannot be filed. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW before any learner exposure.

chapters.title: Clinical documentation overview
chapters.notes: ClinDoc workspace tour: navigator rail, flowsheet pane, intake/output, assessments. Role-driven section visibility.

chapters.title: Flowsheets
chapters.notes: Row visibility, custom time columns, charting at correct timestamp. Hidden rows look like 'missing' documentation.

chapters.title: Required fields
chapters.notes: Mandatory entries block save/file. Highlighted rows + bottom-bar count of remaining required fields.

chapters.title: Corrections / uncharting
chapters.notes: iView correction lane: right-click cell, unchart with reason. Original value retained in audit trail.

chapters.title: Nursing documentation escalation
chapters.notes: Escalation packet: patient, encounter, flowsheet name, row/time, screenshot, error text. Send before paging informatics.
